ASBESTOS DISCOVERY 220, PLAINTIFF TIMOTHY CLARK'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANT YORK INTERNATIONAL CORPORATION'S TAKING OF DEPOSITION AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. THE SCOPE OF THE DEPOSITION IS LIMITED TO THE SITES IDENTIFIED BY PLAINTIFF WHERE HE WORKED WITH DEFENDANT'S PRODUCTS. THE DEPOSITION IS TO BE CONCLUDED BY OCTOBER 15, 2010. Motion To Compel Defendant York International Corporation Taking Of Deposition And Request For Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Sep-28-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Jennifer Alesio, Esq. of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / moving party Timothy Clark
Margaretha M. Smit, Esq. Esq. of BURNHAM BROWN (510-835-6714), appearing for defendant / opposing party York International Corporation

RULING:
PLAINTIFF TIMOTHY CLARK's Motion To Compel Defendant York International Corporation's Taking Of Deposition And Request For Production Of Documents.
No argument was made and tentative ruling adopted as amended: Plaintiff's motion to compel defendant York International Corporation's taking of deposition and request for production of documents is granted. The scope of the deposition is limited to the sites identified by plaintiff where he worked with defendant's products. The deposition is to be concluded by October 15, 2010. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Matter not reported = (220/HEK)
